query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'vacation_periods' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('companyId', 'deletedAt') ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
